query: SELECT DISTINCT ON (slug) slug FROM ( SELECT slug, created_at, cardinality(ARRAY( SELECT unnest(tags) INTERSECT SELECT unnest($2::text[]) )) AS overlap_count FROM skills WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND kind = 'skill' AND status = 'published' AND tags && $2::text[] ) ranked ORDER BY slug, overlap_count DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT $3
